summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of ULFN v1 (Universal Lost & Found Network). Backend APIs 100% passing (37/37 tests). Frontend UI tested across all roles with critical dialog overlay bug fixed. All major features verified: auth, cases CRUD, matching engine, messaging, notifications, role-based dashboards, admin console.

fixed_bugs.issue: POST /api/messages returned 500 Internal Server Error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization
fixed_bugs.fix: Added msg.pop('_id', None) before returning message in messaging.py line 82

fixed_bugs.issue: Dialog overlay blocking all interactions - users could not click type selection buttons or fill form fields inside the wizard
fixed_bugs.fix: Changed DialogContent z-index from z-50 to z-[60] in /app/frontend/src/components/ui/dialog.jsx line 32

passed_tests: Backend: Health check and root endpoint
Backend: Login for all 4 roles (user, ngo, police, admin)
Backend: Mark all notifications as read
Backend: RBAC - user cannot access admin endpoints (403)
Frontend: Home page loads with hero, map, recent reports, how-it-works
Frontend: Browse page with map and filter chips
Frontend: Case detail page with description, location, tabs (Matches, Nearby, Timeline)
Frontend: Login as demo@ulfn.app redirects to /dashboard
Frontend: Report wizard type selection works (after fix)
Frontend: Login as police@ulfn.app shows Police dashboard
Frontend: Login as admin@ulfn.app shows Admin console
Frontend: Admin console shows KPIs (Total reports, Recovered, Pending NGO/Police, Users)
Frontend: Admin console shows charts (Reports over time, By case type)
Frontend: Admin console has 4 tabs (Verifications, Cases, Users, Audit log)
Frontend: Admin Cases tab shows Verify/Spam buttons
Frontend: Admin Users tab lists all 4 demo accounts
